rules: pass and fail require mode=manual, executedAt, executorRole, a complete environment, and manual evidence
screen_reader pass requires assistive technology metadata
browser_zoom pass requires an observed 200 or 400 percent browser zoom
real_device pass requires a non-emulated named device
fail requires a defect task, assigned owner role, severity, and retest status
blocked and not_run require reason, risk, owner assignment status, next action, open question, and task
structural validity does not imply release or Issue completion readiness
